name: Dragon Fist: VR Kung Fu [Multiplayer Play Test]

reviews.review_description: The demo version won’t accept the password

Best fighting game on Quest ez. If you're looking for a good workout 💪 punching kids in the face.  THIS IS IT! It's been in my top3 rotation for months

Also I've got every game so if you need a refferal dm me
can't play.    can't generate code.    why can you make it simpler.
I tried to play this did the discord thing and was still unable to play don’t waste your time.
The game seems really cool and I know I have to join the discord but I can’t. I try to join and it says it won’t work. Anyone got tips for me?

developer_response.body: This is a playtest we are looking for feedback. The discord process is meant to bring users to the discord to engage with the community and give feedback before we launch the full game.

reviews.review_description:
Gameplay after one session has shown me that the physics of this game, the small details (finger jabs, palm strikes, and punches), and ability to kick are awesome to see in VR! Will definitely be purchasing the app and recommending to friends. 

I just need to figure out how to block people’s spam punching haha but this game is a hidden gem!
Have it installed without ability to play it. When it will be released ?

Let me start here, the gameplay could use a little work sure but thats to be expected, BUT HOW ITS FUNCTIONING NOW HAS TO BE NEXT GEN TYPE GAMEPLAY EASILY. Of course there are children on the game so its like watching 12 year olds fight each other which is easily the most fun I had. Only thing is sometimes the knives won't throw and the game will bug if someone leaves who is up next but otherwise I played till my battery gave up. 10/10 easy install

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoyed it! We are really trying to work on throwing mechanics!

reviews.review_description:
caring, and kind developer. All of his works to date have been published and funded on good business. Gaming wouldn't be what it is without Ben Olding. From website sponsorships funding his game development process, to pioneering the Virtual Reality Market after accumulating accolades in mobile development ventures, with his role on teams accumulating in accomplishments that are only ever overshadowed by how ahead of their time his works always come across; Don't neglect the fact that Ben Olding has been a major player in the space, years before his very real and legitimate company was founded- in 2010.

Yes this game is very much under development and no I am not a paid ambassador for the brand. I paid full price for my game on Steam and am just lucky to be using ALVR to use my Quest 2 as motion controllers for PC VR gaming. 

Do Not Forget To Join The Discord To Get The Secret Key, Which Will Change Every Week.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words! Ben is absolutely a force to be reckoned with and we are grateful to have him lead our team!

reviews.review_title: It wont let me go in the discord
reviews.review_description: Wont let me go into discord to get a password to even play the game 💀

developer_response.body: I am sorry you were unable to join the discord. We have always had this link set to make it easy to join https://dragonfistvr.com/discord. Alternatively if you go to the dragonfist website https://dragonfistvr.com/, then you can join via the discord icon at the top of the page.

reviews.review_description:
Dragon Fist VR is a remarkable virtual reality game that has left me thoroughly impressed. One of its standout features is its physics, which are nothing short of amazing, especially for a multiplayer title. The level of realism and interactivity the physics provide really elevates the overall gaming experience. What's even more astonishing is that this game is free to play, making it accessible to a wide audience.

One aspect that could be improved is the character acquisition system. While playing the game can unlock some characters, purchasing the full game for $29.99 gives you access to all of them. It seems like a fair price for the content offered, considering the depth and quality of the game.

The most memorable aspect of Dragon Fist VR is undoubtedly the sheer fun it delivers. It's easily one of the most enjoyable VR games I've ever had the pleasure of experiencing. The martial arts theme immerses players in a world where they can unleash their inner warriors, adding a layer of excitement and engagement that's hard to find elsewhere in VR gaming.

Graphically, Dragon Fist VR is a testament to what the Oculus Quest 2 is capable of. The visuals are crisp and immersive, enhancing the overall martial arts experience. The level of detail in the environments and character models truly adds to the game's overall appeal.

In summary, Dragon Fist VR is a must-try for any VR enthusiast. Its remarkable physics, affordability, and immersive martial arts theme make it stand out in the crowded VR gaming landscape. The $29.99 price for the full game feels reasonable for the content on offer. If you're looking for a VR game that delivers both fun and realism, look no further than Dragon Fist VR.

It's truly commendable that Dragon Fist VR is the creation of a single developer who poured their heart and soul into making this game a reality. The level of dedication and hard work that went into crafting such an enjoyable and immersive experience is evident. It's a testament to their passion for game development, and it's clear that their efforts have paid off beautifully. Dragon Fist VR is a shining example of what a talented and determined individual can achieve in the world of VR gaming.

developer_response.body: If you think the current art is great, wait until you see it at launch. We have been working on a lot behind the scenes I think everyone is going to love! As far as characters go, this is a work in progress. The playtest is meant to give all of our fans a taste of what to expect!

so forgot what my password is for facebook and just asking can you add the full game in app lab

developer_response.body: There is a full version on applab. It has the playtest as part of the game.

reviews.review_description: Expectations: download a demo game and give an honest review. Fact: I require a Discord account to obtain a password. So, if I also require a new password EVERY WEEK to play the demo, why not ask for a credit card? Or a new email? How about access to other social networks? I'm sure they can make money for meta (which ultimately has access to what is done every moment in the device and records, saves and uses the metadata) every week using this scheme FOR A DEMO GAME!

developer_response.body: This is a playtest and we are looking for feedback. The discord process is meant to bring users to the discord to engage with the community and give feedback before we launch the full game. I do not understand the rest of your review, we don't store any metadata.

reviews.review_description: I am so gay

developer_response.body: Plenty of people are. Thank you for the five star review, we are really hoping players leave feedback about the game though!

reviews.review_title: Ben Olding and Dragon fist team
reviews.review_description: I wanted to thank you all im a purchaser of the original game i play it daily month after month doing the master challenge with all character it keep me entertain i heard of the multiplayer only today and im like a kid i want to go test it out right after my lunch by the way best game of all time thank you and do not hesitate this is the best game you will ever find so yep purchase without hesitation :) after fighting the master i cant wait to go try fight with other students cant say anymore i hope to see you all in the arena 🥰
